experiences.name: Morning Farm & Animal Feeding Tour
experiences.short_description: Guided walk through the barns with hands-on animal feeding.
experiences.full_description: Start your day in the barns with our farmers. Feed the goats and chickens, collect eggs, and learn how we care for our animals. This gentle walking tour is ideal for families and guests of all ages.

experiences.name: Family Farm Walk & Garden Visit
experiences.short_description: Relaxed farm walk with a visit to the vegetable gardens.
experiences.full_description: Stroll through our vegetable fields and hoop houses, see what's in season, and learn about our organic growing practices. Includes a short visit with our friendly goats.

experiences.name: Farmstead Cheese Making Workshop
experiences.short_description: Hands-on beginner workshop making fresh farmer's cheese.
experiences.full_description: Learn the basics of turning milk into cheese in this hands-on class. We’ll cover milk selection, cultures, curds and whey, and simple aging tips. You’ll make your own batch of fresh farmer’s cheese to take home.

experiences.name: Herbal Soap & Salve Workshop
experiences.short_description: Make botanical soaps and salves using farm-grown herbs.
experiences.full_description: Blend your own herbal soaps and healing salves using herbs grown on the farm. We’ll cover infusion techniques, safe handling of ingredients, and recipes to repeat at home.

experiences.name: Beginner Farmhouse Pasta Class
experiences.short_description: Saturday evening pasta-making class for beginners.
experiences.full_description: Roll up your sleeves for a hands-on pasta class using farm eggs and seasonal vegetables. Learn to make fresh pasta dough, hand-cut noodles, and a simple seasonal sauce. Includes a sit-down tasting of the dishes you prepare.

experiences.name: Intermediate Sourdough Bread Intensive
experiences.short_description: Evening sourdough class for bakers with some experience.
experiences.full_description: Perfect your sourdough with this intensive baking workshop. We’ll cover starter maintenance, dough strength, shaping, and scoring. Not recommended for complete beginners.

experiences.name: Sunset Orchard Tractor Tour
experiences.short_description: Ride through the orchards with cider tasting at golden hour.
experiences.full_description: Hop on our tractor wagon for a guided sunset tour of the orchards. Learn about our apple varieties and finish with a tasting flight of farm ciders and juices.

experiences.name: Harvest Barn Dinner
experiences.short_description: Multi-course seasonal dinner in the candlelit barn.
experiences.full_description: Celebrate the harvest with a chef-curated, multi-course dinner featuring peak-season farm produce. Includes a welcome cocktail and live acoustic music.

experiences.name: Kids’ Garden Club
experiences.short_description: Hands-on gardening session designed for younger guests.
experiences.full_description: Children dig, plant, and explore in the children’s garden under the guidance of our educators. Parents are welcome to observe or join in.

experiences.name: Cider Pressing Demonstration
experiences.short_description: See how we press apples into fresh cider.
experiences.full_description: Watch our old-fashioned press in action and learn how we turn orchard apples into sweet cider. Includes a tasting of fresh cider and discussion of fermentation.

experiences.name: Meet the Beekeeper
experiences.short_description: Introductory beekeeping talk with hive viewing.
experiences.full_description: Suit up (optional) and step close to the hives as our beekeeper explains honeybee life, hive health, and honey harvesting. Honey tasting included.

experiences.name: Seasonal Flower Arranging Class
experiences.short_description: Create a centerpiece with field-cut flowers.
experiences.full_description: Tour the flower fields, learn basic arranging techniques, and build your own centerpiece to take back to your room or home.

experiences.name: Sunrise Yoga in the Orchard
experiences.short_description: Gentle all-levels yoga among the apple trees.
experiences.full_description: Welcome the day with a gentle yoga practice in the orchard, followed by a warm mug of herbal tea.

experiences.name: Saturday Smokehouse BBQ Night
experiences.short_description: Casual outdoor BBQ with live music and lawn games.
experiences.full_description: Enjoy slow-smoked meats, seasonal sides, and live bluegrass music on the lawn. Ticket includes buffet dinner; drinks available for purchase.

experiences.name: Private Farm Photography Walk
experiences.short_description: Guided walk focused on capturing the farm in golden light.
experiences.full_description: Join a local photographer for a guided walk through scenic parts of the farm. Learn tips for composing great shots of landscapes, animals, and details.

experiences.name: Archived Orchard Walk
experiences.short_description: Inactive sample experience, no longer bookable.
experiences.full_description: This listing is kept for archive purposes and is not available for booking.

menu_experiences.name: Farm-to-Table Tasting Menu
menu_experiences.description: A chef’s choice, multi-course dinner featuring the best of the day’s harvest, optional wine pairings, and house-made breads.

menu_experiences.name: Seasonal Garden Lunch
menu_experiences.description: Three-course lunch with soup or salad, a seasonal main, and dessert using vegetables picked the same day.

menu_experiences.name: Hearty Farmhouse Breakfast
menu_experiences.description: Family-style breakfast with farm eggs, house sausage, roasted potatoes, seasonal fruit, and baked goods.

menu_experiences.name: Weekend Brunch Share Board
menu_experiences.description: A shareable board with cheeses, charcuterie, pickles, jams, and pastries, ideal for two to four guests.

products.name: Raw Wildflower Honey 12oz
products.description: Unfiltered, raw wildflower honey from our hillside hives, bottled on the farm.

products.name: Lavender Infused Honey 8oz
products.description: Delicate raw honey infused with our culinary lavender blossoms.

products.name: Hot Chili Honey 6oz
products.description: Sweet heat for pizza, fried chicken, and roasted vegetables.

products.name: Strawberry Preserves 10oz
products.description: Classic strawberry jam made with hand-picked berries and just enough sugar.

products.name: Peach & Vanilla Jam 10oz
products.description: Sun-ripened peaches cooked slowly with vanilla bean.

products.name: Blueberry Low-Sugar Jam 8oz
products.description: Small-batch jam with whole blueberries and less sugar.

products.name: Bread & Butter Pickle Chips 16oz
products.description: Sweet and tangy pickled cucumber chips, perfect for sandwiches and snacking.

products.name: Garlic Dill Pickle Spears 24oz
products.description: Crisp dill spears with garlic and farm-grown dill heads.

products.name: Spicy Napa Kimchi Quart
products.description: Naturally fermented kimchi with Napa cabbage, daikon, and farm chili flakes.

products.name: Caraway Sauerkraut Pint
products.description: Crunchy, tangy sauerkraut naturally fermented with caraway seeds.

products.name: Spiced Apple Butter 9oz
products.description: Slow-cooked apples with warm spices, smooth and spreadable.

products.name: Smoky Tomato Relish 8oz
products.description: Sweet-smoky relish made from fire-roasted tomatoes and onions.

products.name: Crunchy Chili Crisp 7oz
products.description: Crispy chili oil packed with garlic, shallots, and toasted seeds.

products.name: Mini Honey Sampler Gift Set
products.description: Set of three 3oz jars: wildflower, buckwheat, and blueberry blossom.

products.name: Plum Cardamom Jam 9oz (Archived)
products.description: Seasonal jam from last year’s plum harvest, no longer produced.

restaurants.name: Fieldstone Farm Kitchen
restaurants.description: Our on-site farm-to-table restaurant offering breakfast, lunch, and dinner with ingredients grown steps from the kitchen.

rooms.name: Orchard King Room
rooms.description: Cozy king room overlooking the orchard, a short walk from the farmhouse restaurant.

rooms.name: Hayloft Queen Room
rooms.description: Light-filled queen room with reclaimed barnwood accents and cozy reading nook.

rooms.name: Garden Studio with Kitchenette
rooms.description: Open-plan studio with king bed, sitting area, and kitchenette for simple self-catering.

rooms.name: Farmhouse Suite with Kitchen
rooms.description: Spacious one-bedroom suite with full kitchen, dining nook, and living room.

rooms.name: Courtyard Family Room
rooms.description: Family-friendly room with a queen bed and bunk alcove, opening onto the central courtyard.

rooms.name: Meadow Family Suite with Kitchenette
rooms.description: Two-room family suite with meadow views, sitting area, and compact kitchenette.

rooms.name: Barn Family Loft
rooms.description: Rustic-chic loft space in the converted barn with ladder-access kids’ sleeping loft.

rooms.name: Riverside Cabin
rooms.description: Standalone cabin by the creek with a small kitchenette and private fire pit.

rooms.name: Shepherd’s Hut Tiny Cabin
rooms.description: Cozy tiny cabin on wheels with woodstove heat and shared bathhouse access.

rooms.name: Heritage Main House Suite
rooms.description: Elegant suite in the original farmhouse with clawfoot tub and sitting room.

rooms.name: Courtyard Queen Room (Inactive)
rooms.description: Former queen room currently offline for renovation.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Family Stay with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Includes daily farmhouse breakfast for all registered guests. Free cancellation up to 3 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Advance Purchase Family Rate
rate_plans.description: Includes breakfast. Non-refundable, no changes allowed. Full prepayment required at booking.

rate_plans.name: Meadow Family Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Breakfast included plus access to in-room kitchenette. Free cancellation up to 7 days prior to arrival.

rate_plans.name: Meadow Family Room Only Non-Refundable
rate_plans.description: Room only with kitchenette, no breakfast included. Non-refundable rate with no changes.

rate_plans.name: Barn Family Loft Flexible
rate_plans.description: Room-only rate for the Barn Family Loft. Flexible cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Barn Family Loft with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Includes daily farmhouse breakfast for all guests in the room. Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Garden Studio Rate
rate_plans.description: Room-only studio with kitchenette. Free cancellation up to 3 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Garden Studio Non-Refundable
rate_plans.description: Discounted advance purchase rate for the Garden Studio. No changes or refunds.

rate_plans.name: Shepherd’s Hut Flexible
rate_plans.description: Cozy tiny cabin stay with flexible cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Shepherd’s Hut Non-Refundable
rate_plans.description: Lower non-refundable rate for the Shepherd’s Hut. Full prepayment required.

rate_plans.name: Orchard King Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: King room with orchard view and daily breakfast. Free cancellation up to 3 days prior.

rate_plans.name: Orchard King Room Only Non-Refundable
rate_plans.description: Room-only, breakfast not included. Non-refundable and cannot be changed.

rate_plans.name: Hayloft Queen Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Includes farmhouse breakfast each morning. Free cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Riverside Cabin Flexible
rate_plans.description: Creekside cabin with kitchenette. Flexible cancellation up to 7 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Farmhouse Suite Flexible
rate_plans.description: Spacious suite with full kitchen. Flexible cancellation up to 7 days prior to arrival.

rate_plans.name: Heritage Suite Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Main house suite with breakfast included. Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Standard Courtyard Queen Rate
rate_plans.description: Archived rate for the Courtyard Queen Room, currently unavailable due to renovation.
